textByHashes.85e7d12eda598267b6210c2ebbd96e1238b19476: Of course, we forgot to send the ammo mould!
textByHashes.9b2da899c3731417b7646184c42eb0916f779f30: Don't be silly - the ammo's made by using a mould. Here, take these to him. The instructions explain everything.
textByHashes.b579cae22d15d8893ac70940684569ceab7e86e2: You can't take these things unless you free up some space in your inventory. I suggest you visit a bank and then come back to talk to me.
textByHashes.e1a9a5c7a41b6bd78688ce6aed07c327e36820e3: Thank you, adventurer. The Dwarf Black Guard will remember this.
textByHashes.dcfdd1861650c1eec6f0b9c9120e5eb770b9b71c: Deary me, you are trouble. Here, take this one.
textByHashes.29952cd25a207cb69d15e6fd793e22c0aa3126d1: So has the Captain figured out how to work the cannon yet?
textByHashes.c244519a21c3419719943ab222a757600e147b74: If you can get those items to him it'll be a great help.
textByHashes.f1c1d6efa9decd64f015d58e88024485ed55eac6: I'm good, just working hard as usual...
textByHashes.0e922409d95d5fb09ea95cbbb872088c124c4800: I shouldn't really, but as you helped us so much, well, I could sort something out. I'll warn you though, they don't come cheap!
textByHashes.92834c6f0461a738e710924352da69bd5149ffe2: For the full setup, 750,000 coins. Or I can sell you the separate parts... but it'll cost extra!
textByHashes.3be13f3afc0472bb9e892c2ea889686b8ab8c76d: Okay then, but keep it quiet... This thing's top secret!
textByHashes.def171dccba9f32d477d514a2ca0a09a0241db0c: There you go, you be careful with that thing.
textByHashes.c96a88d5894f0f4b750d860ab1bc58bbf79229b6: Sorry, I can't go any lower than that.
textByHashes.8bbdaf5baba4482794fe0498c6bc18a20d0166bb: Fair enough, it's too much for most of us.
textByHashes.7e60e37e97177e9112d521618de7958a5d661269: There's only so much I can tell you, adventurer. We've been working on this little beauty for some time now.
textByHashes.f938cabec6f8939ad83506a54f79e18aa7ab2921: In short bursts it's very effective, the most destructive weapon to date. The cannon automatically targets monsters close by. You just have to make the ammo and let rip.
textByHashes.82dd570482f2f545eca40679d0df4d891a291a23: That's unfortunate... but don't worry, I can sort you out.
textByHashes.2d86b828b62b7440b432c9f9f7ac10018a690ce3: Keep that quiet or I'll be in real trouble!
textByHashes.2f3c0ec1f5efb3d6dc6aab8ea784bfe427cda592: Oh dear, I'm only allowed to replace cannons that were stolen in action. I'm sorry, but you'll have to buy a new set.
